description_long: This hotel is a two-story stone and wood structure with a steeply pitched, shingled roof and multiple chimneys, evoking a rustic, lodge-like appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from rough-hewn gray stone on the lower levels, while the upper sections and roof gables are clad in weathered wooden planks. Numerous blue-framed windows punctuate the facade, providing a striking contrast to the earthy tones of the building. The main entrance is sheltered by a wooden overhang supported by posts, and a covered walkway extends along one side of the building. Architectural details such as dormer windows, exposed beams, and a prominent central chimney contribute to its traditional, countryside charm. The overall form is asymmetrical, with several wings and extensions creating a complex, inviting silhouette.
description: A rustic, stone-and-wood hotel with a steep shingled roof, blue-framed windows, and multiple chimneys. The building features a covered entrance and walkway, with traditional lodge-style architectural details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long covered walkway, main entrance with overhang, and many blue windows along the stone and wood facade.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entrance area, two-story structure, and the intersection of the building's wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wings, central chimney, and the stone and wood construction without visible entrances.
description_view_3: Front view with the main chimney, symmetrical window arrangement, and dormer windows on the roof.
